title: Corn Delight [Fabric/Quilt]
description: An a-maize-ing addon for Farmer's Delight
body:
## 🌽 Introduction **Corn Delight** is an addon for **Farmer's Delight** that adds corn and corn-related foods.
Just like other crops, corn has it's own naturally occuring wild variant.
Gather kernels, grow them and harvest maize.
We even have cornbread, stuffing, corn tortillas and tacos!
**It's corning time!** ## 🧶 Fabric/Quilt Rewrite This site hosts only the **Fabric/Quilt** versions of Corn Delight.
**Forge** versions can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/corn-delight).
This rewrite is published under the **MIT License**. **
